name: Bug report
about: Report a problem you've encountered

labels: bug

## What happened

A clear description of the problem.

## What you expected

What you thought would happen instead.

## How to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version (`uv run python --version`):
- App version / commit (`git rev-parse --short HEAD`):
- Database: (Postgres version and where it runs)
- LLM provider: (OpenAI / Bedrock / etc, and the specific model)

## Logs

Relevant excerpt(s) from the application log, with secrets and PII redacted.
Avoid pasting the narrative text itself unless strictly necessary.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help us reproduce or diagnose.
